description:

Epic closure criteria:
- schedules are clearly first-class Jidoka features
- tests cover agent targets, session targets, and workflow targets

comments.text: Clarified that the V3 schedule manager is intentionally in-memory/non-durable, documented the boot re-registration boundary, and added a test proving manager state and run history are process-local.
